footer.tagline: The home of mutual aid. A network of living homes where collectives welcome each other.
footer.copyright: © 2026 Casa Minga — The house of the commons. Made with care for collectives who share.

home.heroSubtitle: Casa Minga is a home, apartment and room exchange platform between collective living places: participatory housing, ecovillages, shared houses and coliving spaces.
home.heroJoin: Join {{count}} collective places already on board
home.availableStaysSub: Hosts opening their home or room inside collective places
home.noStays: No place available to swap yet. Be the first to offer yours!
home.discoverPlacesSub: Participatory housing, ecovillages, shared houses: explore the network.
home.howItWorksSub: Four simple steps to swap your place and travel differently.
home.waysSub: From a simple home swap to full immersion in a collective — pick what suits you.
home.exchangeModelTitle: Reciprocal, or in points — never in money
home.reciprocalBody: You host in turn: everyone opens their door, no payment involved.
home.pointsBody: You host, you earn points; you stay, you spend them. Trust circulates, not money.
home.impactTitle: A living network that keeps growing
home.finalCtaTitle: Ready to swap your place and travel differently?
home.finalCtaText: Create your profile, share your home or room, and access a network of collective places across France and beyond.
home.step1Title: Create your profile and your place
home.step1Body: Introduce yourself, your collective and your daily life. It's free and only takes a few minutes.
home.step2Title: Offer your home, apartment or room
home.step2Body: Add photos, describe your space and share your availability.
home.step3Body: Browse participatory housing, ecovillages and shared houses in the network.
home.step4Body: Agree on the exchange directly with your hosts. No commission, no per-night payment.
home.pillar1Body: You're welcomed by people, not a service. Real homes, lived-in, loved, shared.
home.pillar2Body: Discover collective living places, their values, their daily life. Travel by really meeting people.
home.pillar3Body: Verified profiles, reciprocal exchanges, committed places. The joy of finding your home well cared for.
home.economicP1: On Casa Minga, you never pay per night. No commission is taken on your exchanges. The model is simply based on a clear, transparent annual membership.
home.economicP2: And until June 2026, using the platform is entirely free: create your profile, swap your place, travel at no cost.
home.storyP1Part1: Imagine leaving for a weekend, two weeks or a whole month, simply by swapping your
home.storyP2: No impersonal booking. No prices that keep climbing. Just people opening their doors to each other, in places chosen for their values.
home.storyP3: It's more human, more authentic, more free. And it truly changes the way you travel.
home.storyQuote: "We don't rent a place. We swap one home for another."
home.testimonialsSub: The first exchanges between collective living places.

howItWorks.heroSubtitle: Casa Minga lets you discover participatory habitats, offer a stay in a collective living place, and travel differently.
howItWorks.stepsSub: Four simple steps to join the network.
howItWorks.step1Title: Create your profile and your place
howItWorks.step1Body: Add your profile, present your participatory habitat, your co-living or your collective place.
howItWorks.step2Body: Add a description, photos, the values of the place, its atmosphere and hosting possibilities.
howItWorks.step3Title: Publish your stays or explore places
howItWorks.step3Body: Offer a room, a home or an immersive stay, or discover places already on Casa Minga.
howItWorks.step4Body: Send a request, chat with the place or host, and organize a stay at the heart of a collective.
howItWorks.freeBody: Casa Minga is currently free to allow the first places and members to join the network, create their listing and start offering stays.
howItWorks.modelBody: Starting June 2026, Casa Minga will run on an annual membership allowing you to publish, receive requests and participate fully in the network — simply, with no per-night fees or per-stay commission.
howItWorks.stayTypesTitle: What kind of stay can you offer?
howItWorks.stayTypesSub: Four formats, depending on your place and your desire.
howItWorks.stay1Body: In a collective place, a room with an engaged host.
howItWorks.stay2Body: An independent home within a participatory habitat.
howItWorks.stay3Body: Take part in the life of the collective for a few days.
howItWorks.stay4Body: A collective member opens their door to you for a brief visit.
howItWorks.why1Body: Ecology, sharing, simplicity… Each place carries a life project.
howItWorks.why2Body: No commission, no market logic. Just genuine connection.
howItWorks.why3Body: Each listing matches an existing place, verified and inhabited.

about.heroSubtitle: A “minga” is collective work where everyone gives a little of themselves for the common good. That's where our name — and our whole project — comes from.
about.reason1: Everywhere, people are choosing to live differently: in cohousing, ecovillages, cooperatives or committed shared homes. These places brim with experience, know-how and a desire to share — yet they often remain isolated from one another.
about.reason2: Casa Minga connects these collectives. The platform lets you offer a stay in your home and be welcomed elsewhere, without money, in a spirit of exchange and reciprocity. You're not renting a room: you're opening your door to someone who shares the same way of seeing the world.
about.value1Body: No commercial transaction: we welcome each other as people who share the same values. The relationship comes before the service.
about.value2Body: Cohousing, ecovillages, cooperatives, committed shared homes: all these places share the choice to do things together.
about.value3Body: Simplicity, connection to the living world, mutual aid. Travelling from place to place nourishes a tangible vision of living differently.
about.ctaText: List your place or explore the habitats already on Casa Minga.

hospitality.heroSubtitle: A different idea of travel: not consuming a place, but being welcomed by the people who bring it to life.
hospitality.intro1: Conventional tourism puts distance between host and visitor: one serves, the other pays. The hospitality Casa Minga stands for is the opposite — equality, giving, encounter. We welcome one another between collectives because we share the same way of inhabiting the world.
hospitality.intro2: This bond is anything but abstract: it's lived around a table, in a shared garden, during a collective work party or a simple conversation by the fire. It's in these moments that friendships, ideas and sometimes projects are born and spread from one place to another.
hospitality.pillar1Body: Receiving a traveller isn't about providing a room. It's sharing a meal, an evening, the daily life of a place — and letting a real encounter happen.
hospitality.pillar2Body: At Casa Minga, we welcome each other without payment. Host today, traveller tomorrow: the exchange circulates, and that's what builds a network of trust between collectives.
hospitality.pillar3Title: Between peers who understand each other
hospitality.pillar3Body: People living in ecovillages and cohousing share common questions. Welcoming one another means exchanging practices, finding inspiration and feeling understood.
hospitality.ctaText: This hospitality rests on shared commitments — discover them in our charter.

charter.heroSubtitle: A few simple commitments that keep trust alive between all Casa Minga members.
charter.common1: Kindness and mutual respect come before everything else.
charter.common2: No discrimination is tolerated, in any form.
charter.common3: Exchange happens without financial compensation: reciprocity is what keeps the network alive.
charter.common4: In case of disagreement, we favour dialogue, and reporting if necessary.
charter.hostTitle: As a host, I commit to…
charter.host1: Welcome sincerely, and introduce the place, its shared spaces and how it works.
charter.host2: Be clear upfront about what is shared (meals, tasks, house rules) and what isn't.
charter.host3: Respect the privacy and pace of the people I welcome.
charter.host4: Describe my place honestly: no exaggerated promises, no bad surprises.
charter.guestTitle: As a traveller, I commit to…
charter.guest1: Come in a spirit of exchange, not consumption: take part in the life of the place when invited.
charter.guest2: Respect the rules, the spaces and the residents, as I would a friend who hosts me.
charter.guest3: Clearly communicate my dates, needs and any cancellation, as early as possible.
charter.guest4: Leave the place as I'd like to find it, and give honest feedback after the stay.
charter.compass: By joining Casa Minga, every member adheres to this charter. It isn't a contract, but a shared compass.

contact.heroSubtitle: A question, a suggestion, a place to list? We'll be glad to reply.
contact.emailText: The easiest way to reach us. We usually reply within 48 hours.
contact.communityText: Follow news from habitats and stays on the community feed.
contact.howText: Many answers can already be found on our explanations page.

verification.title: Become a verified member
verification.subtitle: Join Casa Minga's circle of trust in a few steps.
verification.statusNoneDesc: Follow the steps below to earn your verified member badge.
verification.statusPendingDesc: Your ID document has been received. An admin will review it soon.
verification.statusVerifiedDesc: Congratulations! You're now one of Casa Minga's trusted members.
verification.statusRejectedDesc: You can submit a new document below.
verification.membershipDesc: Amount to pay by bank transfer before your application is validated.
verification.payReturnDesc: Thank you! Your payment is recorded. Just send your ID document, if you haven't already.
verification.paymentReceivedDesc: Your membership is paid. We'll review your file as soon as we receive your ID document.
verification.paymentInstructions: Make a transfer for the amount shown above, using your email address as the reference so we can match your payment to your account.
verification.paymentNote: Payment confirmation is done manually by the team. No card data is collected.
verification.uploadDesc: Send a photo or scan of your ID card or passport.
verification.uploadSuccessDesc: Your document has been received. Your application is now under review.
verification.uploadErrorGeneric: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
verification.rgpdNotice: By submitting your ID document, you consent to its processing by Casa Minga Séjours for the sole purpose of verifying your identity (legal basis: your consent). The document is stored securely and privately, accessible only to the moderation team, for the time needed to verify it, then deleted (within 3 months at the latest). You can exercise your rights of access, rectification and erasure at any time by writing to ecommunication@etik.com.
verification.fetchError: Could not load your verification status. Please try again shortly.

adminVerifications.title: Identity verifications
adminVerifications.docDeletedHint: The identity document was deleted after review (GDPR).
adminVerifications.docDeleteWarnDesc: The decision was saved, but the document could not be deleted automatically. Delete it manually if needed.
adminVerifications.notPaidDesc: Record the payment received before approving.
adminVerifications.rejectDialogDesc: Provide a reason for rejection (optional but recommended).
